name: Azure SQL Server has no Entra ID (AAD) administrator
description: The SQL Server does not have an Entra ID administrator configured. Using only SQL authentication relies on username/password credentials that can be compromised. AAD admin enables MFA and Conditional Access for SQL access.
remediation: Configure an Azure AD administrator for the SQL Server: Azure Portal → SQL Server → Azure Active Directory → Set admin → select a group or user. Use an Entra ID group rather than a single user for resilience. Enable Azure AD-only authentication to disable SQL auth entirely.
